nav.tagline: The Art of Prayer Bead Craftsmanship

hero.label: Sculptor · Utku Mert Tunçay · Handcrafted Prayer Beads
hero.headline: Perfection by nature cannot repeat itself.
hero.body1: It is always difficult to put into words a craft and philosophy as deep as prayer bead mastery. What we carve is not an object, but the work of "soul", "patience" and "contemplation".
hero.dua1: May Allah grant us to be among those who know.
hero.body2: The master makes each prayer bead once. Each bead a different material, a different decision, a different patience. As the beads turn on the imam cord, the essence of every moment lives at these fingertips.
hero.dua2: May Allah grant us to be among those who see.
hero.seal: May Allah grant us to be worthy of the blessed Veysel Karanî.

manifesto.author: Utku Mert Tunçay
manifesto.quote_em: From a world where there is no room for haste,
manifesto.subtitle: One bead, every moment, perfect patience.

materials.title: Materials & Properties
materials.description: Wood, bone, stone — the prayer bead grows from these three roots. Each material has a different scent, weight and history. Read to discover which one is yours.

ahşap.label: Wood
ahşap.description: The memory of the forest takes the form of a bead. The grain, scent and years of the tree live at the fingertips.

kemik.label: Bone
kemik.description: An ancient material — each bead carries the trace of a life. A palette ranging from ivory white to warm honey.

taş.label: Stone
taş.description: Millions of years of compressed patience. Stone prayer beads are heavy, cool and silent — a reminder of what came before everything.

sentetik.label: Resin & Katalin
sentetik.description: Traditional resin craftsmanship; ancient patience in a modern material. A world of colour from amber yellow to deep purples.

cuts.title: Bead Cut Varieties
cuts.description: The same material feels different with a different cut. In Ottoman workshops each cut had a name and a reason — still valid today. Find the one that sits best in your hand.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Each prayer bead is made once, never the same again. These are from what has been created so far. Which one shall we make for you?

contact.title: Orders & Enquiries
contact.description: Every prayer bead is made to order. Let us talk about material, cut and bead count.
